text:
Created attachment 239323
git diff for graphics/synfigstudio

The git diff attached to this pr upgrades graphics/synfigstudio
to 1.4.4. This upgrade comes along with devel/etl && graphics/synfig

CHANGELOG
https://github.com/synfig/synfig/blob/master/ChangeLog.md

port changes:
Makefile
distinfo
pkg-plist

That's it.

Thanks!

--Chris

P.S. I'm the Maintainer. So approval is implicit. :-)
